name: THREE CENTS Pink Grapefruit Soda Soft drinks
description: Inspired by bartenders for bartenders, Three Cents tonics & sodas were produced to be used as ultimate mixers for cocktails and long drinks. Their all substance and long-lasting fizziness soon elevated their reputation among consumers becoming a top soda beverage choice and a number one premium mixer for long drinks and cocktails.

name: ACALA White Wine Style 0.75L sparkling tea Sparkling tea
description: The aroma and flavour of the White Wine style are born from the perfect combination of two teas. Similar in style to the Chardonnay white wine from Burgundy. These ACALA highlights are highlighted by Felina hemp tea and green tea from the famous Yunnan region of China. The white wine style is distinguished by its balanced complexity - the lingering aftertaste is a perfect match for a variety of dishes. Acala White Wine Style pairs perfectly with rich cheeses like Camembert, roasted chicken, creamy soups, turbot cod, red mullet. Natural sediment may occur. Alc. 0,0 % by volume. Certified by LT-EKO-001 non EU/EU agriculture.

name: PAKRUOJO DVARAS Rhubarb Raspberry lemonade 0.33L Soft drinks
description: "Raspberry rhubarb". Two summer flavors, as if symbolically combining the most pleasant time of the year. The beginning of summer gives us fresh rhubarb, and the second half gives us sweet raspberries.

name: ACALA Spritz Style 0.75L sparkling tea Sparkling tea
description: Perhaps the most famous Italian cocktail is reborn in ACALA's newest sparkling tea. The sparkling fireweed and cinnamon rose tea blends perfectly with Lithuanian wormwood and calendula tea bitters and Italian orange juice. GIA RAM, one of today's most promising painters, has painted 'She is Magical No.01' on the label, emphasising the expressionism of Spritz Style. The bright, modern and eye-catching painting was inspired by a famous actress she met in Griffith Park in Los Angeles. Natural sediment may occur. Alc. 0,0 % by volume. Certified by LT-EKO-001 non EU/ EU agriculture.

name: FEVER-TREE Indian Tonic Water 0.2L Soft drinks
description: A blend of delicate natural flavours and aromas provided by rare ingredients such as hand-pressed bitter orange oil from Tanzania combined with spring water and high-quality quinine. Fever Tree tonic is delicious and natural, with a unique refreshing taste and aroma.

name: PAKRUOJO DVARO Svarainis bazilikas lemonade 0.33L lemonade Soft drinks
PAKRUOJO DVARO Cherry Carolina lemonade 0.33 l Soft drinks
description: We are inspired by the old recipes of Pakruojis Manor Pharmacy and new flavors searches, so we present the first soft drink in Lithuania with one of the hottest peppers in the world - "Cherry Carolina". The well-known "Cherry Brandy" is reborn in a new way. The basis of the fresh juice drink is the rich taste of cherries. And we supplemented it with the infusion of hot pepper matured in the distillery, but also with the infusion of herbs grown in the herb farm located 20 km from the distillery.
